race.comment: FALCON LAIR (2) has started favourite at all four runs this prep but it took until last start to taste success in a BM68 over this distance at Hawkesbury. Beat an in-form stayer that day so the effort had merit. Back against his own age and may use this as a stepping stone to better races in the Carnival. FASHIONABLE (5) is third-up today after a couple of modest efforts over shorter trips so far this prep. Last raced over 2000m in the Wakeful and finished just three lengths away. Ready to find some form in this more suitable contest. GO MARO (4) has attacked the line with gusto of late, beaten a head at his most recent outing over 1625m at Toowoomba. Crying out for this trip so don't rule him out. WORTHY ENUFF (1) made it three from three this time in work when he scrambled home ahead of GO MARO at Toowoomba last start. Also on trial at this distance but does look like a stayer in the making. CASTELLO GRANDE (7) wasn't beaten far by an in-form galloper last start. Worth including.
